summary: A small rectangular bunker-style structure with a stepped pyramid roof made of dark wood. The main body is constructed from stonebrick with a gravel foundation. Features multiple small window openings on the front face and a symmetrical design. The building sits on a dirt platform surrounded by grass.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramid roof

rebuild_hints: Create rectangular stonebrick base approximately 8×12 blocks
Build gravel foundation layer beneath and around the structure
Construct stepped pyramid roof using dark wood/nether wood blocks with 3-4 descending layers
Add small window openings (appears to be 4-5 windows) on front face with glass panes
Ensure symmetrical placement of roof steps
Place structure on dirt platform with grass surrounding
uncertainties: Exact window count and precise positioning uncertain from angles shown
Exact wood type (dark oak vs nether wood) cannot be determined with certainty
Precise depth dimension estimated from perspective views
Whether structure has interior rooms or is solid uncertain
